$comment: The admission-time consolidation judgment's constrained output (017 research D3). Invoked at most ONCE per admission, only when the deterministic cosine screen fires (best same-kind active pair >= SUPERSEDE_SCREEN_TAU). Flat + closed. The hop CLASSIFIES the pair; all apply rules (merge/supersede/keep-both), the trust guard, status writes, and audit wording are pure server functions. Decline bias: uncertain => distinct (keep both). The prompt presents both contents verbatim, blind to which the user 'prefers'.
name: memory_consolidation

relation.description: same_assertion: the two state the same knowledge in different words. updates: the NEW memory replaces the OLD as current truth. context_specific: the new statement is situational and does not displace the standing one (the Berlin/Lisbon rule). distinct: different knowledge. Uncertain => distinct.

basis.description: One sentence of grounds for the classification.

apply_rules.same_assertion: merge IF cosine >= MERGE_SCREEN_TAU AND NOT (new is untrusted AND old is trusted); older record status := merged, replaced_by := new id; contents byte-identical, never edited
apply_rules.updates: older record status := superseded, replaced_by := new id
